details.test: Task 1: Cheapest late-afternoon weekday open play for 2 children
Task 2: Saturday private-room party under $400 with two add-ons
Task 3: Cafe order with coffee and 2 kids snacks (4+ stars, total <= $20)
Task 4: Membership ~3 weekly visits, unlimited weekdays, under $80
Task 5: Two age-appropriate play sessions for siblings on same weekday
Task 6: Apply WEEKDAY10 promo to weekday open play after 12:00 PM
Task 7: Morning play session with Parent Lounge Seat add-on
Task 8: Contact form about nut-free snack options for parties
Task 9: Submit 5-star open play review with toddler details
